title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and gets one last impossible mission.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: A whimsical concierge and his protégé become involved in a priceless painting heist.

title: Stranger Things
description: A group of kids in a small town uncover secret experiments and supernatural mysteries.

title: Soul
description: A jazz musician journeys through an otherworldly realm to rediscover joy in life.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind pushing Gotham into chaos.

title: Interstellar
description: Explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
